acceptance_criteria.description: Users must be unable to access any page without first logging in with valid credentials. Attempting to access a protected page without authentication should redirect to the login page.
kane_steps: Navigate directly to https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html without logging in
Observe that the page redirects to the login page
Confirm that inventory content is not displayed
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Protected pages require valid login first

acceptance_criteria.description: After submitting valid credentials (standard_user / secret_sauce), the user is redirected to the product inventory page.
kane_steps: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
Enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'
Click the Login button
Verify the user is redirected to the inventory page at /inventory.html
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Successful login redirects to inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The inventory page must display product tiles, each containing the product name, an image, and a price.
kane_steps: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to the inventory page
Inspect each product tile on the page
Verify that every tile displays a product name, an image, and a price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Inventory tiles show name, image, and price

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product name on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the product name of any listed product
Verify the product detail page opens for the selected product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product name opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product image on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the product image of any listed product
Verify the product detail page opens for the selected product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product image opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page must display the product name, description, price, and an 'Add to cart' button.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click on any product to open its detail page
Verify the detail page shows the product name, description, price, and an 'Add to cart' button
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Detail page shows name, description, price, button

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can add a product to the cart from the inventory page by clicking the 'Add to cart' button on a product tile.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the 'Add to cart' button on any product tile
Navigate to the cart page and verify the product appears in the cart
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart button adds product from inventory

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking 'Add to cart' on a product tile, the button label for that product changes to 'Remove'.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the 'Add to cart' button on a product tile
Verify that the button label for that product changes to 'Remove'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart button becomes Remove button

acceptance_criteria.description: After adding a product to the cart, the cart badge in the top navigation updates to reflect the current number of items in the cart.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Note the initial cart badge value (or absence thereof)
Click 'Add to cart' on one product
Verify the cart badge in the top navigation now shows '1'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart badge updates with item count

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can remove a product from the cart directly on the inventory page by clicking the 'Remove' button on the product tile.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on the same product tile
Navigate to the cart page and verify the product is no longer listed
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button removes product from inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking 'Remove' on a product tile, the button label changes back to 'Add to cart'.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on the same product tile
Verify the button label reverts to 'Add to cart'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button reverts to Add to cart

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can navigate to the cart page by visiting /cart.html.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/cart.html
Verify the cart page loads successfully

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart page lists all items that have been added to the cart, displaying each item's name, quantity, and price.
kane_steps: Log in and add two or more products to the cart from the inventory page
Navigate to the cart page at /cart.html
Verify all added products are listed, each showing the product name, quantity, and price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart page lists items with name, quantity, price

acceptance_criteria.description: The inventory page includes a sort dropdown in the top right corner that users can interact with to sort products.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Locate the sort dropdown in the top right area of the page
Verify the dropdown is visible and clickable
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown present on inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The sort dropdown contains exactly four options: Name (A to Z), Name (Z to A), Price (low to high), and Price (high to low).
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the sort dropdown in the top right corner
Verify the four options: 'Name (A to Z)', 'Name (Z to A)', 'Price (low to high)', 'Price (high to low)' are present
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown has four correct options

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown displays the cheapest product (Sauce Labs Onesie at $7.99) as the first item.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product tile displays 'Sauce Labs Onesie' with a price of $7.99
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Price low to high sorts cheapest item first

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Name (A to Z)' from the sort dropdown displays 'Sauce Labs Backpack' as the first product in the list.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Name (A to Z)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product tile displays 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Name A to Z sorts Backpack first
